overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment. The player character moves from a curved city street past a waterfront promenade, along a pedestrian sidewalk lined with palm trees and vendors, under a massive overpass with digital billboards, and finally onto a highway ramp into a covered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved city street with commercial mega-building

events.description: begins turning right toward the waterfront pedestrian access

agents.ego_description: walking along curved road, passing vehicles on the right side of the street

entered.detail: tall commercial building with distinctive orange structural beams and multiple digital billboards
large suspension bridge spanning across the waterfront in the distance
multiple colorful advertising screens mounted on the building facade
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a curved city street in a futuristic urban environment. The camera moves forward along asphalt road, passing an orange-framed mega building covered in digital billboards on the right. A cable-stayed bridge is visible in the distance to the left, and sparse vehicle traffic moves along the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with yellow safety barriers

events.description: moves from city street onto waterfront walkway with yellow barriers
descends stairs to lower waterfront level

agents.ego_description: walking down to waterfront promenade level with yellow safety railings

notable_agents.action: person in red shirt walking along the waterfront path toward the camera

entered.detail: bright yellow safety barriers lining the edge of the waterfront promenade
body of water visible beyond the yellow barriers
metal railing fence along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a waterfront promenade with distinctive yellow concrete barriers. The camera descends stairs to a lower level, walking along the water's edge with a metal fence on the right. A pedestrian in red walks toward the camera as the cable-stayed bridge remains visible in the center distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian sidewalk with street vendors and palm trees

events.description: ascends back to street level from waterfront
passes street vendor stalls and food carts

agents.ego_description: walking up from waterfront and continuing along sidewalk past food stalls and planters

notable_agents.action: person with red mohawk and white jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: food carts and vendor stalls with awnings along the left sidewalk
large concrete planters containing palm trees lining the walkway
elevated walkway bridge spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends back to street level and proceeds along a pedestrian sidewalk lined with palm trees in concrete planters and street vendor stalls on the left. An overhead pedestrian bridge becomes visible in the distance. A pedestrian with a distinctive red mohawk passes by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway under massive overpass with digital advertising screens

events.description: passing under the overpass into shadow, large digital billboards overhead
preparing to turn left toward highway ramp

agents.ego_description: walking under the massive overpass with large digital billboards including 'Bottoms Up' advertisement overhead

notable_agents.action: person in green jacket walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass creating a gateway effect with shadowed underside
large digital screen displaying 'BOTTOMS UP' advertisement with a man's face
digital screen displaying 'NET DREAM' text with graphics
elevated highway ramp visible to the left leading upward

segments.scene_description: The walkway leads under a massive concrete overpass that creates a semi-covered environment. Large digital billboards including a prominent 'Bottoms Up' advertisement dominate the overhead space. The lighting shifts to mixed shadows as the camera passes underneath, with moderate pedestrian traffic and a highway ramp becoming visible to the left.

events.description: turns left onto highway ramp entering covered corridor
enters darker tunnel-like space under the highway structure

agents.ego_description: turning left onto highway ramp and walking under the overpass into a darker enclosed corridor

notable_agents.action: white car driving on the highway ramp ahead of the camera

entered.detail: enclosed concrete tunnel structure forming the highway underpass
metal safety railings along the left side of the highway ramp
buildings with glowing neon signs visible through the left side openings

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left onto a highway ramp, transitioning from the open sidewalk into a narrow enclosed tunnel-like space under the highway structure. The environment becomes darker with low lighting, metal guardrails line the left side, and a white vehicle is visible driving ahead on the asphalt ramp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban landscape that shifts from a wide city street to a waterfront promenade and finally onto a bustling pedestrian sidewalk. It begins by moving along a curved asphalt road, passing an orange-framed mega building adorned with digital billboards while a cable-stayed bridge looms in the distance. As the camera descends a set of stairs, the scene transitions to a lower-level waterfront promenade defined by yellow concrete barriers and a metal fence along the water's edge. The camera then ascends back to street level, where the environment opens up into a sidewalk lined with palm trees in concrete planters and various street vendor stalls. The movement continues past a pedestrian with a red mohawk before turning toward a distant overhead pedestrian bridge.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling urban walkway into the dim, enclosed confines of a highway ramp. It begins by passing under a massive concrete overpass where the open air is replaced by a semi-covered environment dominated by glowing digital billboards and a prominent Bottoms Up advertisement. As the camera moves through the mixed shadows and pedestrian traffic, the perspective shifts toward a highway ramp appearing on the left. The scene then transitions as the camera turns left, leaving the sidewalk behind to enter a narrow, tunnel-like space under the highway structure. Finally, the environment darkens further, moving past metal guardrails on the asphalt toward a white vehicle driving ahead in the low light.
